summary: Completed comprehensive testing of User Feedback feature. All backend API tests passed (11/11). All frontend UI tests passed - Settings dropdown shows Feedback menu, page loads correctly, bottom sheet works, modal with type/severity/message/screenshot works, and feedback submission creates new items.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend feedback routes properly registered in routes/__init__.py
Frontend FeedbackPage.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
API correctly validates feedback types (issue, improvement, general) and severity levels
MongoDB _id properly excluded from responses in feedback_service.py
Feedback list sorted by newest first as expected
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed feedback items for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Feedback feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/feedback, GET /api/feedback/my, GET /api/feedback/{id}. Frontend: /settings/feedback page accessible via Settings dropdown. Modal supports Issue/Improvement/General types with severity dropdown for Issue type. Screenshot upload uses Object Storage integration.

backend_apis.GET /api/feedback/my: PASSED - Returns user's feedback list sorted by newest
